title: Pinterest (PINS) Earnings Dates, Call Summary & Reports
text: TipRanks provides comprehensive coverage of Pinterest's earnings reports and analyst forecasts. The platform tracks upcoming earnings dates and provides detailed analysis of company performance versus expectations. Recent coverage highlights Pinterest's strong Q1 2026 results with $1.008 billion in revenue (18% YoY growth) and earnings per share of $0.27 versus $0.23 expected. The company's Q2 2026 guidance of $1.133-1.153 billion in revenue exceeded Wall Street expectations of $1.11 billion. TipRanks analyst ratings show a consensus Buy rating with an average 12-month price target of $26-27, suggesting continued upside potential. The platform has tracked Pinterest's transformation narrative from social media platform to AI-powered visual search and commerce engine. Key metrics tracked include monthly active users (631 million, up 11%), Performance+ advertising adoption, free cash flow generation, and regional revenue trends. TipRanks maintains historical earnings data showing Pinterest's progression through multiple phases of profitability and growth, with recent quarters showing strong operational execution and margin expansion.
